title: Claude FM 🎵 music for thinking and building
summary: Claude FM is a music streaming service created and curated by musicians, designed to provide background music for thinking and building activities. It is offered by Claude and available on YouTube.
writeup: The video introduces Claude FM, a music service from Anthropic positioned as a complement to its Claude AI assistant. The service is made and curated by musicians, with tracks intended to accompany thinking and building work. The takeaway is that Anthropic is extending its product lineup beyond the assistant itself into curated audio aimed at focused activity.
